title: helianthus × laetiflorus f. rigidus
intro: Helianthus × laetiflorus f. rigidus, also known as the stiff sunflower, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae), known for its vibrant yellow flowers and stiff, upright growth habit. The medicinal properties of Helianthus × laetiflorus f. rigidus include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Helianthus × laetiflorus f. rigidus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
